horoscopes.title: Aries Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: Mercury's arrival in Aries, joining the Sun and Mars, indicates a period of increased personal visibility. You may feel more inclined to take on new responsibilities in both your personal and professional life. The First House signifies new beginnings, such as launching plans, engaging in direct discussions, or making definitive choices that could evoke responses from others. With the Sun in the First House, there is an emphasis on personal renewal and self-care, perhaps through new health or beauty routines, marking your solar return. The strong planetary influences in your sign advise a careful approach to your assertive nature to prevent disagreements during this week.

The current transit of Venus through Taurus indicates a period of significant attention to financial matters, potentially involving increased spending. While opportunities to improve income or receive benefits are likely, these will be accompanied by expenses. You may also prioritize personal aesthetics, leading to the purchase of related items. This is also a favorable time for learning, teaching, and public speaking, with relevant opportunities emerging. Additionally, someone may express practical or material interest in you.

Layered underneath it all, Mars will form a supportive sextile to Pluto in your eleventh house, and that will bring a powerful and concrete development through friends, networks and long term goals. You will take action within the group or social circle that shifts your position, that means you taking up a lead role, making strategic move, or aligning with people who help you to move forward. There will be team meetings, and it can happen online or offline, which will bring a big impact on your personal and professional life.

horoscopes.title: Taurus Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: Big shifts will be coming up for Taurus, as Mercury will also be joining the Sun and Mars in the twelfth house of behind the scenes. This will activate your private life, so you will not be much visible outwardly, but a lot of will be happening too. There will be private conversations, you will get some updates about a private event, or a foreign collaboration. The Sun, Mars or Mercury do not like to be in the twelfth house, so you can be a bit irritated, and impulsive, so don’t mingle with anyone whom you get negative vibes. You will be spending more time in rest and restoration too.

Venus, your ruler is moving through the first house, so you will feel the importance of improvement in your personal life and health. You want changes in your appearances, your energy, and how others respond to you. You will decide to change your look, update your style, or do something that enhances your confidence, and it will get noticed in the right way. People will come to you, you will receive compliments, attention, or even single Taurus Sun, Moon and rising natives will get closer opportunities to find someone they like.

Mars is forming a sextile to Pluto in your tenth house, and that will bring visible developments in your career and public life. You will take strategic action that shifts your position and this could be speaking to someone in authority. You will make calculated moves, or you will handle a responsibility, that puts you in stronger light. There are chances to get a new professional connection or you get a new role, or you will decide to take control of a professional situation, but make sure you don’t trigger anyone at work. Pluto is known as the mafia lord of the zodiac, so make sure you keep your work and image transparent.

horoscopes.title: Gemini Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: A noticeable shift will begin to take shape through your social world this week, as the Sun, Mars and Mercury will be in Aries which rules your eleventh house of team settings. Your life will move faster as there will be a lot of activity within the group, and you will even be the big contributor. You will respond to an invitation, message, or a group situation that needs a fast action, so you will be able to manager that situation. Since the Sun, Mars and Mercury are fast and aggressive planets you can also expect arguments within the team. However, this week will bring opportunities to spend time with the siblings, children, and job seekers may even get a new opportunity.

Venus, the planet for love and diplomacy is moving through the twelfth house, which is the favourite place for Venus, and that will bring emotional developments. You will take a step back from a person or situation without making it obvious, choosing distance or silence rather than confrontation, and that will help you regain the balance. There will more interest in prayer and meditation, so you will go for such sessions, including healing. You will also begin to let go of something you have been holding onto.

Mars will sextile Pluto in your ninth house, and this harmonious aspect will bring clear results about higher education, so this is a good week to explore new courses, enrol in some or you teaching others. You will make some decisions about something expands your life, this could involve travel, and foreign collabs too. You will have a long term plan, and once you decide things will move faster. This is a good week for writers and publishers, as they will get better opportunities and will see visible progress at work.

horoscopes.title: Cancer Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: You will be very much visible this week, as Mercury will be coming into the tenth house, and Sun and Mars are already there. You will take charge of a situation connected to career, responsibilities, and long term goals about your public life, and they will not go unnoticed. There will be some important conversation with people in authority, or a decision about your direction will take place, so you need to respond accordingly. New job opportunity, a new task or job related discussions like interviews and debates can also come up. Since the Sun, Mars and Mercury are aggressive planets, the chances for arguments at work are also seen.

Venus is in a supportive role as it is moving through the eleventh house, so there will be beneficial developments through friends and support groups. Someone will reach you out with an opportunity, or introduce you to the right people, or offer their support in some complex tasks. You will also find a new friend during this time, or you will gate chances to join a new long term project as well. This is also a good time for single Cancer Sun, Moon or rising natives, as they will find the closest opportunities to find someone special. Foreign collaborations, interaction with futuristic people , and celebrations also will be the part of this week.

Meanwhile, Mars is forming a sextile to Pluto in your eighth house, and this harmonious aspect will bring a decisive action about your finances, or joint accounts. You will address a situation that regarding your financial liabilities, and there are chances for repayment too. Mars is the planet for financial liabilities but Pluto is making a favourable aspect, so you will get a financial aid, or someone will give a hope. However, you may have some emotional concerns regarding partnerships from personal and professional domain.

horoscopes.title: Leo Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: A new direction will begin this week for Leo Sun, Moon and rising signs as Mercury will join Sun, and Mars in the ninth house. The circumstances will push you to think beyond the limits, and take some decisions which need expansive thinking, and decision making. There will be clear plans about higher studies, as Mercury is the planet for studies, it can be about getting updates about new courses, or education in a foreign land. Long trips, foreign collaborations, and projects from writing or publishing can come up during this week too. You may also argue with someone, over opinions or beliefs, but it will help you to understand what others think about the same.

Venus transit through the tenth house is progressing, and that will bring visible developments in your career and public image. You will be appreciated for your work, but make sure you do worthy things so that you can get noticed. People in authority will watch your work, and this is also the time for appraisals and promotions. Job seekers will have the closest opportunity to get a new job, which will be highly rewarding and long term. Those who work in creative sector, and business will have better opportunities during this week.

Martian transit is moving through the air sign of Aries, and it will form a pleasant aspect to Pluto in the seventh house, so there will be progress in the relationships from personal and professional sector. You will be active in the public, and there will be new business opportunities or your clients will give you good review. An uncertain situation will reach a clear conclusion, as the people in the situation will take firm forward steps. This is also a time to attend public functions like business meets, parties or personal functions.

horoscopes.title: Virgo Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: You will be focusing in an urgent situation as the Sun, Moon and rising signs will have a loaded eighth house with Sun, Mars, and Mercury. This is the week to take crucial decisions regarding finances, commitments and shared finances, so the week will bring more concerns regarding financial matters. The eighth house indicates emotional matters, and the Sun, Mars and Mercury are not good in dealing with the emotional matters, so you will have to control your emotional self. Sudden expenses, changes in the existing loans, tax, PF and insurance related plans also will be coming up during this week.

At the same time, Venus is moving through the ninth house will surely bring some support from your elderly figures, gurus or mentors. They will give the right advice to face the situation, so it’s very important to spend time with them. There will be updates about foreign collaborations, or long trips, or global venturers, which will surely encourage you. This is a great week for students, as they will be able to join a new course, or complete a course. If you are a writer, then you will get multiple opportunities to publish your article or publish in the media as well.

Astrological alignments indicate new professional assignments may arise. Your precise handling of tasks and situations will earn recognition from colleagues. You are positioned to effectively manage your workplace, organizing projects with support from your team. Health requires attention, particularly concerning your diet and lifestyle choices. It is advisable to prioritize nutritious food and moderate physical activity, avoiding strenuous exercises that could strain your spinal region. Your daily schedule may become busy, necessitating clear strategic planning.

horoscopes.title: Libra Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: For Libran Sun, Moon and rising signs, the relationship sector will be very active as the Sun and Mars are already in Aries, and Mercury will come into this sign during this week. You will engage in direct conversation to clarify what you want from a relationship, and it can be personal or professional. This discussion will involve multiple people, client or close associate, and there will be honest interaction. New business initiatives are possible but make sure you clearly read the terms and conditions. Social gatherings like business meets, parties and other meetings during this time. Since the Sun, Mars and Mercury are aggressive planets, so there are chances for arguments with the spouse as well.

Venus’s transit is progressing through own sign Taurus, and that will bring tangible developments in the financial matters as Venus is moving through the eighth house. You will receive financial support as Venus is a natural benefic, so you will be feeling better about financial matters. You will settle a payment, or get a favourable financial deal, or your partner will support your financial transactions. However, there are chances for sudden expenses, so you need to be prepared for that. You will also restructure your loans, tax, PF and insurance related plans.

By mid-week, Mars will have a favourable aspect to Pluto, so the creative activities will be high, so there will be decision making regarding own ventures. You will make a bold move, and this can be in expressing your feelings, follow or stalking someone, or taking a risk in your love life. You will think about your passion projects, but make sure you don’t take any risk, as Mars is a bully and it will provoke you to take unwanted risks. Children and youngsters will have more role in your life.

horoscopes.title: Scorpio Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: Your daily life is very significant as the Sun and Mars are moving through the sixth house, and Mercury will join them this week. Your schedule, workload, and daily structure will increase so there will be a lot of tasks. You will try to deal with some workplace issues, but you should stay away from triggering colleagues as there are chances for arguments. Three planets in one house means stress, so there will be work related stress. You will take part in some competitive events, like interviews, debates or sports too. These planets also show a change in your diet, or health care practices.

Venus will impact your public life, as it is moving through the seventh house so, get ready to mingle with more people than usual. This is a very good transit to try to encash it by meeting more people, and use the contacts productively. This is a good transit for business owners, as they will get better deals or profitable business ideas. Single Scorpio Sun, Moon and rising signs will have the closest opportunities to meet someone special through group events. There will be social gatherings, team meetings and even parties, but kindly avoid oversharing.

Mars will have a harmonious aspect with Pluto, so there will be a calculated move behind the closed doors, especially regarding a lingering family matter. You will be forced to take control over a family matter, whether it’s a family issues, or a family responsibility. There will be activities like a real estate deal, renovation or other home improvement plans too. Your family members, especially young male members will need more support, and they can behave aggressively. Someone will visit your home, or you will go to meet some of the family members or friends during this week. Altogether the weekly horoscope is showing a busy week.

horoscopes.title: Sagittarius Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: This is the time to express yourself, and you are doing that, but from this week onwards you will be unstoppable, as the Sun, Mars and Mercury trio will have a huge influence on the fifth house of creativity. You will have multiple creative projects, and you will get more visibility through that as well However, you should not spend too much in these projects as the chances to make money from them is a bit low. You will get a message, invite, or review from someone, which will surely motivate you. There will be more interaction with children, youngsters, and single Sagittarius natives will have the closest opportunities to find someone special.

Venus transit through Taurus will bring progress in the daily life, but there will be minor obstacles at work, as Venus is moving through the sixth house. You will get some support, help or appreciation from someone at work, and you will also get new opportunities at work. This Venus will also bring new work device, or you will decorate your workplace. The sixth house indicates health also, there are chances for minor health related concerns, so please avoid any kind of junk diet and avoid sugar.

Mars will have a harmonious aspect to Pluto, you will be very busy throughout this week, as this aspect will impact the third house of multitasking. You will be pushed to take some action through communication, planning, or you will have team meetings. You will say something that can trigger an issue, but this is not the time for that. There will be multiple events like networking, team meetings, and social media activities, but please avoid posting sensitive comments. There will be short trips, teaching, training and writing related opportunities too. There will not be any random acts, but you will choose what to do.

horoscopes.title: Capricorn Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: Your home and personal matters will be highly triggered, as the Sun and Mars are already in Aries, during this week, Mercury also will join Aries. There will be multiple activities at home, and something within your living space or family dynamic will change. This is a red flag, as none of these three planets likes to be in the fourth house, so make sure you take initiatives to keep peace, otherwise things can go out of your control. Additionally, you can expect family meetings, real estate deals, home improvement projects, or relocation as well. There will be decision making regarding ancestral property as well.

At the same time, Venus will impact the fifth house, which neutralise the tough situation at home, as it is moving through the house of creativity. You will be able to spend time in passion projects, and people will appreciate that. This is a good time for start self-promotional activities or create a SEO friendly website, or add SEO packages in the existing website. You will get time to meet likeminded people, and they will share beneficial ideas. This transit will bring the closest opportunities to find someone you like and start a relationship.

Mars will have a harmonious aspect on Pluto in the second house, so you have to take control of your expenses. You will have money, but there will be some financial issues, so please cut off your expenses during this week. New job opportunities will come up, but they will take time to fructify. You will also upskill, and that will surely bring results after some time, but the chances to get freelance projects are visible, so make some plans for that. The second house indicates facial area, so you will enquire about some facial or oral treatments too.

horoscopes.title: Aquarius Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: The Sun, and Mars are in Aries, and Mercury will enter this fire sign, so you will be very busy throughout the week. Your days will fill with movements as the third house indicates movement. You will have a lot of communications, calls, texts, or conversations which push your life forward. There will be multiple tasks from various communication based domain like teaching, writing and publishing related domain. You will have more conversations with your siblings, neighbours and communities, and you will be a bit burdened about that. There are chances to get new electronic devices or repair the existing ones.

Venus will bring a comforting atmosphere at home, as it is moving through Taurus, so the family environment will be better. Venus is the planet for harmony and diplomacy, so the family members will be keeping peace with each other. There will be family functions, and you will hold such functions at home, or you will go to meet them. Gifting is also possible, and you will be motivated by the family roots too. Home improvement projects, real estate deals, and renovation can happen as the part of this transit. You will also buy some expensive devices for home.

Mars will have a harmonious aspect to Pluto in your first house, that will bring an action packed personal life. You will make a move that bring solid changes in your appearance and style. People will start seeing you in a different way, but it can make them offended as well. Mars will bring new plans into your life, and there will be career related events as well. Please make sure you don’t offend anyone through your actions, especially at work, if you want the benefit of this aspect. There are chances for minor health issues like headache or fever, but this will be temporary.

horoscopes.title: Pisces Weekly Horoscope Starting April 12
content: Your attention will turn towards material things as the second house of financial matters and material wealth will have the Sun, Mars and Mercury. This is a tough situation, so make sure you cut of your expense as Mars will be here for at least thirty days. So, the expenses will be huge, and you will get progress after sometime. However, the entry of Mercury into the second house will be bringing some changes, as you will get new job calls or freelance projects, so please work hard to get them. You will also restart upskilling, and through that also you will get good offers, but it will take some time.

Venus is moving through the earth sign of Taurus, which will bring some benefits through your communicative skills. You will have positive reviews from others, so try to promote your business on life or offline. There will be a lot of conversations, text messages, or phone calls, and you can also expect meetings online as well as offline. There will be family functions, and meet up with siblings, or there will be some networking events too. You will also get opportunities to teach, train travel and publish your articles, so, get ready for a busy week.

Mars will have a harmonious aspect with Pluto in the twelfth house, so you will have secret tasks, which will be happening behind the scenes. You will deal with a private matter, and it can be like leaving a project or cutting down something which do not help you to grow. The twelfth house indicates rest and restoration, so you will spend more time in healing and restoring your health. There will be some updates about your foreign collaborations, or someone living abroad. At the same time, you should not overshare with anyone about your personal or professional life.
